"BOOKS" as books_f4a675c8
# PUBLIC.BOOKS.BOOKS
------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK   # Unique (internal) id for book
  "TITLE" "VARCHAR(255)"   # Book title
  "DESCRIPTION" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE   # Book description (Usually the blurb from the book jacket or promotional materials)
  "PUBLISHERID" "INTEGER"   # Foreign key to the book publisher
  "PUBLICATIONDATE" "DATE" NULLABLE   # Book publication date
  "PRICE" "DOUBLE(64, 0)" NULLABLE   # Current price for the book
